description: Lane B Intelligence Hub audit P0/P1 fixes

fixes.fix: Added tier_visibility to MarketSignalRow interface + select query. rowToSignal now reads tier_visibility from DB; falls back to tier_min mapping (paid→pro); finally 'free' for older rows. Client-side belt-and-suspenders gate is now real.

fixes.item: BrandIntelligenceHub.tsx — mock Position Summary Banner, 3 tabs show mock data without DEMO label (P0 fake-live)
fixes.fix: Added DEMO badge inside Position Summary Banner. Added DEMO badge at top of Brand Performance, Reseller Intelligence, and Market Position tab panels.

fixes.item: IntelligencePricing.tsx — mockTierData with no DEMO label, 3x font-playfair (banned token) (P0 fake-live + design violation)
fixes.fix: Added DEMO banner at top of pricing page. Replaced all 3 instances of font-playfair with font-sans.

deferred.item: businessIntelligence.ts imports mockSignals (P0) — all Business Portal operator insights are mock
deferred.reason: Requires real data wiring (new DB queries + hooks). Deferred to INTEL-WO-01 scope.

deferred.item: IntelligencePricing.tsx upgrade button calls alert() — needs real Stripe integration
deferred.reason: Requires Stripe product/price ID configuration. Deferred to PAY-WO-01 scope.

deferred.item: BrandIntelligenceHub.tsx — deriveOperatorEnrichment() presents computed synthetic enrichment with no explicit DEMO label per-operator
deferred.reason: Page-level DEMO labels added. Per-operator enrichment label is a UX enhancement — deferred.
